framework: UNESCO AI Competency Framework for Teachers (AI-CFT) 2024
note: Performance-based competency mapping. Strength is a ceiling on observed evidence_strength.

WS4_B1.rationale: Selects a threshold from the grid using classification performance, demonstrating parameter application.

WS4_B2.rationale: States MCR-minimization as the criterion for threshold selection.

WS4_B3.rationale: Compares two threshold candidates with MCR values and justifies the better choice.

WS4_B5.rationale: Evaluates a peer statement about minimum MCR and explains the reasoning.
